## From Prediction to Industrial Usage: The Materials Intelligence Platform Accelerating Materials Discovery & Development
What if you could predict a material’s performance before making it? Quantistry makes that possible. Our AI for materials design and materials simulation software replace guesswork with data-driven answers. From quantum chemistry modelling to alloy design and battery R&D, we cut testing costs and speed up innovation.
Which of these 1,000 candidates is most likely to succeed?
How can we make our existing polymer 20% more heat-resistant?
What is the most cost-effective way to achieve our target properties?
## From Bottleneck to Breakthrough
## with our Materials Intelligence Platform
Quantistry acts as an intelligent co-pilot for your materials scientists and engineers. It takes on the slow, complex, and repetitive work of material simulation and analysis, giving your R&D team more time to innovate.

## Materials Intelligence That Delivers Results
We provide a powerful digital lab for materials to design and test innovations on a computer before you ever create them in the real world.
### Define Your Challenge with AI for Materials Design
Easily input your desired material properties or target challenge through our intuitive interface. Set your constraints and goals, and let the platform handle the complexity.
![Goal](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68bac276e5723102d2767e6b_lucide_goal.svg)
![Atom](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68bac2764c3e0d9373076e37_mdi_atom.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68bac2765a33d984c1e43c78_carbon_constraint.svg)
**AI-Powered Pathway Determination**
**Holistic Candidate Analysis**
### Let Our Materials Intelligence Platform Do the Work
Our AI engine determines the optimal computational pathway, orchestrating quantum mechanics, classical physics, and advanced ML/AI models to find the best candidates among millions of possibilities.
**AI-Powered Pathway Determination**
**Holistic Candidate Analysis**
